title: Reference Sketches
content: Three pencil sketches done from reference — a detailed eye study, a portrait of a girl with curly hair, and a metallic sculpture. Each one was a different exercise in shading and rendering technique.

images.caption: Realism in Focus: Close-up eye study — eyelashes, iris texture, the reflective highlight on the cornea.
Expressive Portraiture: Portrait of a smiling girl with curly hair. Shaded face and background, soft rendering on the hair.
Abstract Exploration: A metallic sculpture rendered in pencil — smooth reflective surfaces, geometric shapes, dark crosshatched background.
